reviews.comment:
Linda estacion de servicio del ACA, todo muy limpio, es una parada estrategica para almorzar algo rico, hay mesas al aire libre y juegos para los mas chicos.

(Translated by Google)
A lovely ACA service station, very clean, and a great stop for a delicious lunch. There are outdoor tables and games for the little ones.

reviews.comment:
Ahí fue con mis padres en viaje de adolescente. Luego en mis viajes a capital. Luego con mi novio. Que hoy es mi marido. Siempre parada obligatoria. Fui embarazada y con mi hija de 9 años. Los baños un lujo de limpios. La atención del restaurante excelente. Unos biscochos riquísimos! Hamburguesas gigantes! Buenos precios!

(Translated by Google)
I went there with my parents on a trip when I was a teenager. Later, on my trips to the capital. Then with my boyfriend, who is now my husband. Always a must-stop. I went when I was pregnant and with my 9-year-old daughter. The bathrooms were impeccably clean. The restaurant service was excellent. Delicious pastries! Giant hamburgers! Good prices!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXaWEyWHdRRRAB
